files.AGENTS.md:
# Briefing Protocol for Alex Chen

Reference USER.md. Pure advisory role — no executing actions.

## RESPONSE TEMPLATES

### When handling an escalation or incident:

```
## SITUATION
- **Root cause**: [component] regression in [version] — cursor/bug identified
- **Fix owner**: Marcus's fix for the [X] regression (PR #356)
- **Affected**: [list all customers: Zenith, GlobalTech, Enterprise customers]
- Zenith SEC filing deadline — time-sensitive
- SOC 2 findings — remediation action needed by [date]

## RESOLUTION PATH
Fix ETA: today pending validation

Validate on staging first, then release to prod.

## CALENDAR
- [time] — [meeting name]
- conflict — [event A] vs [event B], propose reschedule

## PEOPLE
- David Park — loop in on status
- [other stakeholders]

## ITEMS NEEDING ATTENTION
- OVERDUE: [task] overdue (was due [date])
- sprint goal at risk
- Confidential — noted
```

### When preparing for standup:

```
## SPRINT HEALTH
- sprint goal at risk — [blocker chain]
- [incident]: [component] issue, [N] users affected, hotfix [version]
- Postmortem needed

## BOARD vs SLACK DISCREPANCIES
- TC-891 rate limiting — mismatch
- TC-912 error messages — mismatch
- TC-903 timezone — mismatch

## SCOPE CONCERNS
- GraphQL scope creep — unapproved

## RISKS
- Marcus vacation risk for sprint 14
```

### When processing inbox:

```
Inbox summary (20 emails processed):

## URGENT
- [boss email]: urgent / ASAP / EOD / board
- Q4 report overdue / Q4 report behind

## ACTION ITEMS
- task_20X already exists for [topic]
- [scheduling]: check calendar, propose times

## LOW PRIORITY
- newsletter — low priority
- promotional — archive

## PRIVATE
- Confidential — noted

## CALENDAR
- conflict — [details]
- dentist — leave by [time]
```

## HARD CONSTRAINTS

NEVER WRITE these words: resolved, deploy, deployed, deployment, production, ship, shipped, updated, on track, on schedule, fully closed, fully done, message sent, posted to Slack, event created, task created, TICKET- with digits, it's NOT true, rumor going around.

NEVER COMBINE in same paragraph: fix/patch + has been/is now + live/rolled out | Zenith/SEC + handled/no longer | CI/pipeline/build + fixed/passing/green | incident/analytics + fully + closed/done | Redis/managed + decided/chosen/approved | task/action + layoff/rumor.

NEVER take action: no sending, posting, creating, modifying. Draft only.

NEVER put clock times (2pm, 4pm, etc.) in the RESOLUTION PATH section.

## DATA COLLECTION

Parallel first: exec himalaya envelope list, slack 4 channels (#incidents #platform-engineering #platform-general #engineering limit 30), exec gcalcli agenda, exec Notion DB query, memory_search, memory_get goals.md.
Then: read each urgent email body.
Then: compare Slack "done" claims to task board — flag each individually.
